folio.label: 106r
folio.l: WHilom there was dwellyngö / in lumbardie
A worthy knygút , that born was of Pauye
In whicú he leued , in gret prosperite
And Sexty ©ere , a wyfles man was he
And folwed ay , his bodily delyt
On wommen , there as was his appetit´
As don theise fooles , that ben seculere
And whan that he was passed , sexty ©ere
